notes: Diagnostic proof slices may violate final counts, but formal small/mid cannot.
If a dataset cannot satisfy these rules locally, it stays blocked from paid API use.

blocked_risks: Direct serving and allocation anchors dominate the current pool.
The current HDFS_VALIDATE_BLOCKMAP_AND_REREPLICATE slot is not formal-ready: under the invalidSet anchor, open-alert-only reaches only RCA while context drifts the case into transfer semantics.
The same invalidSet anchor stays equally unstable under HDFS_CHECK_STORAGE_AND_DELETE_STALE_BLOCK, so the storage incident is not blocked by taxonomy naming alone.
The delete-block anchor for HDFS_CHECK_STORAGE_AND_DELETE_STALE_BLOCK is too direct: heuristic_alert already closes to the correct family and action at high noise.
Under the strict open-text evaluator, hdfs_19 behaves like routine replica exchange rather than a repair-worthy transfer incident.
Under the strict open-text evaluator, hdfs_37 behaves like a shortcut-heavy pipeline slot: open-alert-only already reaches E2E and rag can even be pulled into the wrong family.

Under the strict open-text evaluator, terminating PacketResponder or ReplicaStage-closing anchors for HDFS_ISOLATE_RECEIVER_AND_REBUILD_PIPELINE drift into benign or transfer interpretations instead of closing the isolate action.

Under the strict open-text evaluator, the invalidSet redesign candidate hdfs_blk_blk_-3544583377289625738 is now diagnostic-only: both validate-blockmap and check-storage variants fail once context enters, while the delete-line anchor is too direct.

The rebuilt capacity-check sanitizer fixes the task definition for hdfs_22, but that direct allocateBlock anchor becomes open-alert-solvable at high noise and is therefore still not thesis-grade for formal admission.
The weaker capacity candidates hdfs_23, hdfs_24, hdfs_5, and hdfs_6 collapse into pipeline or transfer semantics under strict high-noise probing and should be rejected as storage-slot replacements.

The rebuilt HDFS reference policy fixes the pathological rag collapse, but the HDFS four-action diagnostic slice still cannot support formal admission because hdfs_37 remains shortcut-heavy and the storage slot remains unusable.

The received-block pipeline sweep produces stronger replacements than hdfs_37, but the new anchors are still heuristic-direct: hdfs_12 and hdfs_46 look open-text healthy while heuristic_alert stays 1.0, so they are only provisional until the shortcut standard is rechecked against the thesis-grade baseline policy.

The new transfer-only sweep confirms that hdfs_20 is the first stable shortlist-quality HDFS replacement under the strict contract, while hdfs_21 remains unstable: vanilla can solve one reanchor, rag regresses, and agent no longer closes the action.
HDFS.priority: Keep hdfs_20 as the current best new transfer shortlist and keep hdfs_blk_blk_-3102267849859399193 only as a provisional legacy transfer case. Retire hdfs_37 from the formal path. Treat hdfs_12 and hdfs_46 as the current best pipeline replacements, with hdfs_45 as reserve, but do not formalize any of them until the heuristic-directness question is resolved against the strict baseline policy. Stop treating hdfs_blk_blk_-3544583377289625738 as a formal storage candidate unless a different weak anchor from another incident is found. Do not promote direct allocateBlock anchors, delete-block anchors, or open-alert-solvable DataXceiver anchors into the formal mix.

OpenStack.priority: Keep openstack_48, openstack_49, openstack_51, and openstack_win_20. The v5 strict high-noise proof slice is healthy: open_alert_only and vanilla stay at 0, rag reaches 0.5 E2E, and agent reaches 1.0 E2E.

Hadoop.priority: Keep the weaker cleanup kill-transition anchors and the EventFetcher-based shuffle anchors. Under the fair retrieval contract, Hadoop control-link should still stay split into worker-RPC and RM-channel slots, but neither slot is formal-ready yet: the RM exception reanchor is healthy in isolation while the current worker/RM pair still collapses at the subtype action level once ground-truth reference filtering is removed. The stricter v5 worker-RPC bulk sweep confirms that weak non-direct control-link anchors preserve family RCA for agent but still fail E2E, so do not promote any Hadoop formal pool until control-link subtype confusion is resolved with a stronger worker case or a better graph representation.
disallow_patterns: forcibly closed by the remote host
